note: MxBadgeTone adds 'neutral' — the base badge the kit expresses by omitting tone.
MxButtonSize adds 'medium' — the base size (kit sm/lg + unstated base).
MxChipVariant adds 'standard' — the outlined base chip the kit expresses by omitting variant.
MxIconTileTone adds 'primary' — the base tile tone.
Flutter disables via onPressed:null, not a bool — the idiomatic disabled state.
Flutter disables via onChanged:null, not a bool.
Flutter a11y label for the icon-only FAB; no kit prop (kit relies on aria on the DOM node).
Flutter holds the query in a TextEditingController, not a value prop.
TextField idiom — Flutter's stand-in for the kit's value/onChange pair.
TextField idiom — focus control has no web-prop equivalent.
Flutter enables hover/press by passing onPressed, not a bool flag.
Flutter a11y label for an interactive card; no kit prop.
Flutter decomposes the kit's ReactNode action slot into actionLabel + onAction.
Half of the decomposed action slot (see MxSectionHeader/action).
Half of the decomposed action slot (see MxSectionHeader/action).
Kit hardcodes the sample term (친구) as a static fixture; Flutter takes term:String.
Kit fixture stubs the audio button with a literal node id; Flutter wires the real onAudio callback.
Kit fixture stubs the edit button with a literal node id; Flutter wires the real onEdit callback.
Kit hardcodes the sample meaning as a fixture; Flutter takes meaning:String.
Kit hardcodes the sample typed answer (친고) as a fixture; Flutter takes typed:String.
Kit hardcodes the sample correct term (친구) as a fixture; Flutter takes correct:String.
InputBoxTone adds 'neutral' — the base border the kit expresses by omitting tone.
Flutter's InputBox takes a child (a TextField while typing); the placeholder belongs to that field, not the box.
Kit hardcodes the sample term (학교) as a static fixture; Flutter takes term:String.
Kit fixture stubs the audio button with a literal node id; Flutter wires the real onAudio callback.
Kit fixture stubs the edit button with a literal node id; Flutter wires the real onEdit callback.
MatchTone adds 'none' — the neutral base the kit expresses by omitting tone.
Kit wires the tap via node-id delegation; Flutter's MatchTileView takes an explicit onPressed callback.
Kit passes a game descriptor object (id/icon/name/desc); Flutter decomposes it into typed icon/name/description params.
Flutter dims + disables via null onPressed, not a bool.
Decomposed field of the kit g object.
Decomposed field of the kit g object.
Decomposed field of the kit g object (g.desc).
Kit wires the tap via node-id delegation; Flutter uses onPressed (also the disabled signal).
Kit hardcodes the sample source label as a fixture; Flutter takes sourceLabel:String.
Kit fixture stubs the tap with a node id; Flutter wires the real onPressed to open the sheet.
Kit hardcodes the selected option as a fixture; Flutter takes selected:GameSource.
Kit fixture stubs selection; Flutter wires onSelect:ValueChanged<GameSource>.
Kit hardcodes the active dot index (3) as a fixture; Flutter takes active:int.
Kit hardcodes the sample term (학교) as a fixture; Flutter takes term:String.
Kit hardcodes the sample meaning (school) as a fixture; Flutter takes meaning:String.
Kit hardcodes the sample meaning (school) as a fixture; Flutter takes meaning:String.
TextField idiom — binds the edit field's text; no kit equivalent.
Kit fixture stubs the edit button with a node id; Flutter wires the real onEdit callback.
Kit fixture stubs the cancel button with a node id; Flutter wires onCancel.
Kit fixture stubs the save button with a node id; Flutter wires onSave.
Kit's string state ('idle'/'audio') is a bool `playing` in Flutter.
The bool form of the kit's state prop (state==='audio').
Kit hardcodes the sample term (학교) as a fixture; Flutter takes term:String.
Kit fixture stubs the audio button with a node id; Flutter wires the real onAudio callback.

Kit's string state ('goal-missed'/'many-wrong'/default) is a ResultHead enum (`head`) in Flutter. NB: ResultHead {standard,goalMet,goalMissed} has NO 'many-wrong' equivalent — a behavioral gap tracked in docs/agent/props-parity/QUESTIONS.md Notes.
The ResultHead enum form of the kit's state prop.
Kit fixture stubs the primary button with a node id; Flutter wires onPrimary.
Kit fixture stubs the secondary button with a node id; Flutter wires onSecondary.
Kit passes a pre-rendered app-bar node; Flutter builds its own MxAppBar internally.
Kit's fixtured bar stubs the close action; Flutter wires onClose.
Kit fixture flag toggles between two hardcoded streak/goal states; Flutter takes the real values instead.
Kit hardcodes the streak label ('13 days'); Flutter takes streakLabel:String.
Kit hardcodes the streak caption; Flutter takes streakCaption:String.
Kit hardcodes the goal label; Flutter takes goalLabel:String.
Kit hardcodes the goal value ('20/20 min'); Flutter takes goalValue:String.
Kit hardcodes the goal percent (70/100); Flutter takes goalPercent:double.
Kit fixture stubs the restart button with a node id; Flutter wires onRestart.
Kit fixture stubs the back button with a node id; Flutter wires onBack.
Kit's relearn flag shows the not-counted note; Flutter drives that note from the `wrong` pick state instead.
Kit hardcodes the prompt term (학교); Flutter takes term:String.
Kit hardcodes the choice list; Flutter takes choices.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the correct choice to grade against.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the currently chosen option.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the wrong-pick state (also drives the relearn note).
Kit fixture stubs the options; Flutter wires onChoose.
Kit hardcodes the term tiles; Flutter takes terms.
Kit hardcodes the meaning tiles; Flutter takes meanings.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the matched set.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the selected term id.
Kit fixture stubs the tiles; Flutter wires onSelectTerm.
Kit fixture stubs the tiles; Flutter wires onSelectMeaning.
Kit hardcodes the term (친구); Flutter takes term:String.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes meaning:String.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the revealed state.
Kit fixture stubs the Show button; Flutter wires onReveal.
Kit fixture; Flutter wires onNext.
Kit hardcodes the term (학교); Flutter takes term:String.
Kit hardcodes the meaning (school); Flutter takes meaning:String.
Kit fixture stubs the Next button; Flutter wires onNext.
Kit hardcodes the meaning label; Flutter takes meaningLabel:String.
Kit hardcodes the meaning (school); Flutter takes meaning:String.
TextField idiom — binds the answer field's text; no kit equivalent.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the hint-shown state.
Kit fixture; Flutter takes the hint text.
Kit fixture stubs the Help button; Flutter wires onHint.
Kit fixture stubs the Check button; Flutter wires onCheck.
